{{Infobox character
| name = Mariala Brechess
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
| name = Mariala Brechess
| aliases = Mariala
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = student, mage, wizard
| abilities = fortune magic, see the future through Aetheric symbols, prepare spells in advance, cast fortune spells, cast offensive spells
| affiliations = Brechess family, Magic Tower, group of six students
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Mariala Brechess Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala Brechess is a professional fortune mage and a human woman who possesses half-Aethril heritage. This lineage manifests in her black hair, which contains shimmering silver sparks resembling stars, and provides her with a natural sensitivity to the [[Aether]]. Although she appears much younger than her actual age in her thirties, she is a seasoned adult with prior professional experience. Mariala serves as the leader of a group of five mages from the [[Magic Tower]] who have abandoned their previous responsibilities to follow a professor in hopes of refining their magical abilities. This decision has resulted in her and her companions becoming fugitives from the [[Galactic Union]]. Mariala's personal ambitions involve using her magical prowess to secure a political role within Planetary [[Security]]. She intends to use such influence to rectify injustices and reform her family, though she currently lacks authority within the Brechess lineage. In combat and tactical situations, she is highly observant, often analyzing magical currents, identifying weaknesses in enemy defenses, or using her specialty to reinforce protections. She is proficient with various tools, including a blazing rod and protection amulets, and has demonstrated the ability to use fortune magic to assist in complex maneuvers. Despite her nervousness regarding certain high-stakes conflicts and the potential for being labeled a traitor, she frequently acts as a spokesperson for her peers.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Mariala Brechess is a member of the Brechess family and a student specializing in fortune magic. A human woman suspected of being half-Aethril, she possesses black hair and eyes that drift as if watching the [[Aether]]. During her studies, she utilizes a tablet and stylus to record her notes in class. She is also known to carry a blazing rod that emits a powerful destructive [[aura]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a human woman suspected to be half-Aethril.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] has black hair and eyes that drift as if watching the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Mariala is a student whose specialty is fortune magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a student with half-Aethril hair.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a student who uses a tablet and stylus for notes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a student in the class.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] belongs to the Brechess family.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] possesses fortune magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a student who carries a blazing rod with a powerful destructive [[aura]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a young, half-Aethril woman.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Mariala is a student on the shuttle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Mariala is a student on the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Mariala is someone the narrator's students could contact.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a mage from the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Mariala has seen the narrator's summons in action before.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Mariala was present behind the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Mariala is a student and uses a wand.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A certified wizard and half-Aethril, Mariala Brechess possesses a natural sensitivity to magical currents. She is a mage capable of seeing the future through [[Aetheric symbols]] and can cast fortune, offensive, and pre-prepared spells. While she has never served in the [[Union military]], she observed the conflict occurring on the [[Subline]]. Representing a group of six students, Mariala utilizes an optical implant and wears a mantle around her neck.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a half-Aethril with natural sensitivity to magical currents.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala is an actual wizard who passed her certification.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mariala Brechess]] watched the conflict on the [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Mariala Brechess]] is a mage who can see the future through [[Aetheric symbols]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala can prepare spells in advance.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala can cast fortune spells.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala can cast offensive spells.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala represents the group of six students.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala has an optical implant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala pulled a mantle around her neck.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Mariala has never served in the [[Union military]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Mariala, come forward. What’s your specialty?”

“Fortune magic,” she responded.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Mages]]
